title: US yields remain a key market driver
summary: US long-term yields remain an important factor for equity valuation, especially for growth and technology assets.

title: Risk appetite remains supported
summary: Major equity indices continue to show positive short-term momentum, supporting a constructive risk sentiment.

title: Energy prices monitored for inflation pressure
summary: Oil and gas prices remain relevant inputs for inflation expectations and commodity-linked market pressure.

title: Dollar strength remains a portfolio risk factor
summary: Dollar moves remain important for global risk appetite, commodities and foreign earnings translation.
